name: china-local-life-assistant
description: China local-life flagship assistant. Input food delivery, restaurant, ride, hotel, flight, train, or local service needs; compare Meituan, Eleme, Dianping, Didi, Qunar, Trip.com, and related options by price, time, distance, ratings, coupons, and risk. No login, booking/order submission, or payment.
author: harrylabsj
